benefits.description: Down more than 50 pounds and 10 pounds from goal
Revved up metabolism, sharp turnaround from zero energy, could pressure wash house
Metabolic boost and fat burning; as close to an antidote as possible after 30 years of health disasters

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg retatrutide, now at 4mg. Has complex health issues and needed metabolic boost and fat burning, not just appetite suppression. Former athlete and disciplined person who previously lost weight but couldn't maintain it (required 800 calories/day, led to zero energy). Retatrutide resolved this issue with metabolic increase and energy.
